reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark the master-plan gate and onboarding-smoke claim satisfied only for checked-in gate definitions, workflow verify invocation, and the external consumer smoke path; do not claim GitHub executed the workflows for this commit.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names checked-in local gates, GitHub workflow wiring, and an external consumer smoke path that can be protected by deterministic tests and smoke output.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by checked-in tests proving verify workflows call `npm run verify` and package scripts keep local gates plus `consumer:onboard:smoke`, and by an external consumer onboarding smoke run that reaches install, adapter init, minimal wiring, adapter resolve, doctor ready, and a bounded evaluate fixture packet.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the workflow/package-script test and external consumer smoke aligned when verify gates, hook gates, or onboarding command names change.
